notes: Original generation ZLX-15P (not the G2). Connector details confirmed from the official ZLX Series Owner's Manual (covering ZLX-12P, ZLX-15P, ZLX-12, ZLX-15) via ManualsLib, corroborated by multiple retailer listings. The G2 (ZLX-15P-G2) has a different connector set: it drops the 3.5mm aux input and adds Bluetooth, and has an updated 4-channel mixer section. This entry covers the original ZLX-15P only.

ports.name: Input 1
ports.note: XLR/TRS combo jack, balanced mic/line input with gain control

ports.name: Input 2
ports.note: XLR/TRS combo jack, balanced mic/line input with gain control

ports.name: Aux In
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo auxiliary input for media devices

ports.name: Link Output
ports.note: XLR output carrying sum of all inputs; used for daisy-chaining additional speakers

ports.name: Mains In
ports.note: IEC AC power inlet; operates 100–240V AC
